types.name: feat
types.description: A new user-facing feature in application code

types.name: fix
types.description: A bug fix in application code

types.name: docs
types.description: Markdown, readme, or prose documentation files only

types.name: chore
types.description: Maintenance, tooling, config files, or infrastructure that is not build or ci

types.name: build
types.description: Build system, bundler config, docker, or dependency changes

types.name: style
types.description: Formatting, whitespace, semicolons with no logic change

types.name: ci
types.description: CI/CD pipelines and workflow files only
